plugins.name: crbiz-pm
plugins.description: CRBiz PM for Claude Code. PM-as-Configuration-Overlay grammar with reference implementations of the Catalyst-app and discovery-strategy archetypes. Install via marketplace on any surface; slash-command invocation runs in Claude Code CLI on a local folder or a Claude Code remote session against a repo (not currently supported in claude.ai/code Cowork). Bidirectional HTML board with IndexedDB-persistent file access + full-width Kanban + dedicated Issues & Risks tab, chip-spawn wrapper with per-chip git worktree allocation + MCP smoke-test enforcement, Tie-back protocol, lean PM context. v2.1.3 of the PM-on-CC discipline — operator-visibility release: closes BUG-013 (persistent board access docs) + BUG-014 (v2.1 item #9 Issues+Risks layout); adds pm-self-review skill (/pm-self-review invocable end-of-session template); adds worktree-visibility PreToolUse hook closing the PM3 §1.1 drift (~10-hour, ~8-PR failure mode). 38 skills + 6 agents + SessionStart hook + 2 PreToolUse hooks (git-stage-guard + worktree-visibility-guard).

plugins.name: pm-board-keeper
plugins.description: DEPRECATED in favour of crbiz-pm v2.0 (which lifts the pm-board skill + pm-board-keeper agent + 6 pm-board-* commands). Stand up and maintain a single-file HTML PM dashboard (docs/board.html) for chip-spawn workflows.
